languages.text: Ужасающая машина каждой деталью бросает вызов Омниссии.
Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.
languages.original_text: Ужасающая машина каждой деталью бросает вызов Омниссии.

traits.locale_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

languages.text: 这台恐怖机器的每一处细节都是对欧姆尼赛亚的侮辱。
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: 这台恐怖机器的每一处细节都是对欧姆尼赛亚的侮辱。

languages.text: Hasta el último detalle de esta espantosa máquina es una afrenta al Omnissiah.
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el último detalle de esta espantosa máquina es una afrenta al Omnissiah.

languages.text: Cette terrifiante machine, jusque dans ses moindres détails, est un affront à l'Omnimessie.
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Cette terrifiante machine, jusque dans ses moindres détails, est un affront à l'Omnimessie.

languages.text: Bu korkunç makinenin en ince ayrıntısına kadar her şeyi, Hermesih'e bir hakaret.
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Bu korkunç makinenin en ince ayrıntısına kadar her şeyi, Hermesih'e bir hakaret.

languages.text: Jedes noch so kleine Detail dieser schrecklichen Maschine ist ein Affront gegen den Omnissiah.
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: Jedes noch so kleine Detail dieser schrecklichen Maschine ist ein Affront gegen den Omnissiah.

languages.text: この恐ろしい機械のあらゆる細部が、オムニシアの怒りを買う。
languages.original_text: Every last detail of this terrifying machine is an affront to the Omnissiah.

traits.locale_text: この恐ろしい機械のあらゆる細部が、オムニシアの怒りを買う。
